name: Runick Tip
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神碑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ルーン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>穂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>先</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Activate 1 of these effects, but skip your next Battle Phase after activation;
● Add 1 "Runick" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Runick Tip", then banish the top card of your opponent's Deck.
● Special Summon 1 "Runick" monster from your Extra Deck to the Extra Monster Zone.
You can only activate 1 "Runick Tip" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes from the top of your opponent's Deck
